name: python3-wcwidth
title: python3-wcwidth
summary: determine printable width of a string on a terminal
description:
determine printable width of a string on a terminal
wcwidth allows one to determine the printable width of a string on a terminal.
It provides functions similar to wcwidth(3) and wcswidth(3) for Python
programs.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-wcwidth because determine printable width of a string on a terminal.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-wcwidth as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-wcwidth with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-wcwidth --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
